Description: A scenic alpine village surrounded by green valleys and towering mountains. I chose this place because I’m drawn to dramatic mountain landscapes, quaint villages, and the combination of natural beauty and peaceful alpine life.
A turquoise alpine lake surrounded by mountains; I chose it because of its peaceful scenery and stunning water color.
Historic cobblestone street with old buildings and a clock tower — I chose it because the classic European architecture and narrow lanes evoke a strong sense of nostalgia and timeless charm.
Historic stone streets and old-town architecture of Edinburgh — chosen because its medieval vibe and quiet, cobbled streets evoke nostalgia and a sense of history.
Snow-covered city street of New York, with buildings and lamps glistening under a white blanket — I chose it because snow transforms the urban hustle into a calm, almost magical winter scene.
Aerial view of Barcelona’s rooftops and architecture — I chose it because the dense, colorful buildings and historic-modern contrast capture the vibrant urban beauty and charm of the city.
Historic stone buildings and old-town architecture by the sea in Acre — I chose it because its ancient walls and Mediterranean vibe evoke heritage, history and connection to roots.

A historic street in Istanbul with the Galata Tower rising above — I chose it because the ancient architecture and urban layers evoke rich history, cultural depth, and a sense of timeless exploration.

A view of traditional houses and canals in the Netherlands — I picked it because the classic narrow houses with gabled rooftops and water-city layout show the unique charm of Dutch architecture and give a nostalgic, peaceful vibe.
Buckingham Palace façade and surrounding memorial statue — I chose it because it represents iconic royal history and classic European grandeur, which evokes awe and admiration for heritage.
